name: Pheasant Veronique
recipeInstructions:
1. Set the oven to 350°F (gas mark 4).
2. Wipe the pheasants, season, and rub well all over with butter. Place a knob of butter inside each bird.
3. Place the pheasants breast side down in a deep pot roaster or flameproof casserole.
4. Cover and cook with stock and buttered paper. Cook for 1 to 1 1/4 hours until tender, turning the birds breast side up after 25 minutes.
5. When cooked, remove the pheasants and keep hot.
6. Reduce the remaining liquid a little and strain into a saucepan.
7. Blend the arrowroot with a little water and then stir into the hot stock. Bring to a boil and stir until the sauce thickens and clears.
8. Add the grapes, cream, and lemon juice, then heat through without boiling.
9. Check the seasoning.
10. Arrange the pheasants on a serving dish, spoon the sauce over, and serve.
